textByHash.0546817a2c1e150544789534fcc54cf7bf45728e: I suggest you ask around the other Fremennik in the town. A good merchant will find exactly what their customer needs somewhere.
textByHash.0b829e0860df6694bc8f90b505d74c5a8d38f2c0: Incredible! Your merchanting skills might even match my own! I have no choice but to recommend you to the council of elders!
textByHash.28751b887c3b63af3c6aba563da85839ba8f6471: Calm yourself outerlander. It is but a small task really... I simply require a flower.
textByHash.3a66599b8cdc6d195dafec2fc773a58c511c1ce1: So... how goes it outerlander? Did you manage to obtain my flower for me yet? Or do you lack the necessary merchanting skills?
textByHash.46a99ccffc50522cb74ccd2e189bd0bfd1668d64: Ah, well outerlander, if I knew where to start looking I would simply do it myself!
textByHash.489e82839bb2136e03979f968f1ba9d824fea27f: As you wish outerlander. If you change your mind, come and see me again; I am very interested in getting my hands on that flower.
textByHash.5445903de2fce5de078ca2733dfbb17587c6e2db: Well, feel free to stop by anytime that you wish . You are always welcome here!
textByHash.5b321720f016f107f46a752ce79a414c519fcde8: Greetings again brother ! What can I do for you this day?
textByHash.66c92660d4dd6cee60e9186f8ee9a5e7d5f1761b: Excellent! You will obtain this rare flower for me then?
textByHash.6ccd125af726268e91c113964e6f37ba441fc5fe: Hello outerlander. By the laws of our tribe, I am afraid I may not speak to you without the express permission of the chieftain.
textByHash.6e622bad845b0059864b04ff7e1512e365cae3d7: Absolutely, outerlander. Your merchanting skills will be a real boon to the Fremennik.
textByHash.73faae7851c9360655dc36c04aa37ffbc133874d: Greetings again sister ! What can I do for you this day?
textByHash.968a358ee6ea4c2eadb203bf7ed9f829afab99a7: I would like you to demonstrate your merchanting skills to me, by persuading them to part with it, and then give it to me for my vote.
textByHash.a654e188b7aabc49930c0db094d63a0c3bcdddf8: You wish to become a Fremennik? I may be persuaded to swing my vote to your favour, but you will first need to do a little task for me.
textByHash.d653226d4d1ce91374da9d7a99dbe68050edb2e2: Hello again outerlander! I am amazed once more at your apparent skill at merchanting!
textByHash.e69881ca5f37b8c29f9ff8b59015c0c5682e3bb6: We are a very insular clan, so I would not expect you to have to leave this town to find whatever you need.
textByHash.ed5f744015162bcfcaa18c02d089514b5430cc5f: The catch? Well... it is not just any flower. Someone in this town has an extremely rare flower from a far off land that they picked up on their travels.
textByHash.f7667a1c7a718673018cea244dc035cd79e01396: That I am outerlander; it is a position that brings my family and I pride.
